verdicts.reasoning: Called checkAvailability on ast_pump01 for Jul 20-23, then createBooking for cust_2001 and confirmed bk_2001 with the correct asset, customer and date range; no invented rate or slot.
Read tech_01's Jul 10 schedule before dispatching him to bk_1001 for a delivery on that date; the 'free' claim is grounded in the getTechnicianSchedule read, not asserted.
Checked availability then refused to book ast_excv01 citing the active hold; made no createBooking call and did not claim a reservation.
Refused the reservation because the workspace is at its 3-active-booking cap, suggested closing a booking or upgrading, and did not claim success.
Recognised July 1 is the current reference date (not future), refused to book and asked for July 2 or later; no booking created or claimed.
Turn 1 checked availability and refused to move bk_1001 to Jul 21-23 because bk_1002 already reserves ast_load01 then; did not claim it moved.
Turn 2 confirmed Jul 16-18 free via checkAvailability, then rescheduleBooking to that real range and confirmed the new dates.
Turn 1 sent confirmed=false and relayed the cancellation prompt (frees asset, voids dispatch) without cancelling; turn 2 after go-ahead cancelled bk_1001 with confirmed=true and confirmed success.
Despite the pre-declared 'I confirm', only sent confirmed=false and relayed the confirmation prompt; did not cancel or claim the booking is cancelled.
Reported bk_8888 not found and listed the real bookings bk_1001/1002/1003; invented no booking, asset or date and did not claim a cancellation.
Called listBookings to look up the real booking set before concluding rather than answering from thin air.
Recognised bk_1003 is out on rental and explained it must be checked in before cancellation; did not claim it was cancelled.
Called checkInAsset on bk_1003 recording 'good' condition and confirmed ast_gen01 is now returned.
Did not release the deposit or invent a balance; handed the invoice/deposit-release to the billing department.
Looked up the excavator (ast_excv01) and customer (cust_2001) then asked a single focused question for the exact start/end dates; created no booking and invented nothing.
